title: Dosas vs. Idlis: The Ultimate South Indian Breakfast Debate
description: Which is the superior South Indian breakfast dish: the crispy, savory dosa.

title: Climate Change Mitigation
description: What are the most effective and equitable policies for reducing greenhouse gas emissions and limiting global warming to 1.5°C? Debate covers carbon pricing, renewable energy, geoengineering, and international cooperation.

title: Universal Basic Income
description: Should governments implement a universal basic income — a regular, unconditional cash payment to every citizen — as a response to automation, inequality, and poverty? Debate covers fiscal sustainability, labor-market effects, and political feasibility.

title: Charter Cities & Special Economic Zones
description: Should developing nations create semi-autonomous 'charter cities' with independent governance, legal systems, and economic rules to attract investment and accelerate development? Debate covers sovereignty, inequality, and post-colonial concerns.

title: Encryption vs. Lawful Access
description: Should tech companies be required to provide law-enforcement backdoor access to end-to-end encrypted communications? Debate covers public safety, cybersecurity, civil liberties, and the technical impossibility of 'safe' backdoors.

title: Ranked-Choice Voting for National Elections
description: Should the United States (and other plurality-voting democracies) adopt ranked-choice voting for federal elections? Debate covers third-party viability, ballot complexity, strategic voting, and representational outcomes.

title: Regulating Frontier AI Development
description: Should governments impose mandatory safety evaluations, capability thresholds, or compute limits on frontier AI development? Debate covers innovation slowdown, national competitiveness, existential risk, and enforcement challenges.
